title: Craftsman's bows
description: A small mod that adds four ranged weapons with a vanilla Minecraft feel.
body:
![Craftsman's Bows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c884b08ccdc67141088973fd24d6a3452d131c5a.png) This is a simple and small mod that adds some vanilla-style ranged weapons.
I made this as a mod creation and Java coding practice. ## With the [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector),this mod also work with NeoForge! ## Items ### Shortbow ![Shortbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e27a9e28dc3cf56bf69e44ccfd53d24d1d1ad139.png) - Faster charge, shorter range, and less damage - Movement speed doesn't decrease while drawing, and you can even sprint. ### Longbow ![Longbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66eebf9d7dc38896dff08bd5885ba6e26d3a452e.png) - Slower charge, longer range, and more damage. - If you do not charge it to the maximum, the arrow's flight distance will be greatly reduced. - The screen zoom while drawing is stronger than with a normal bow. ### Shot Crossbow ![Shot Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dca520e6748f1aab5128eefd6df0a44452b3606.png) - A crossbow that fires five arrows at once. - It cannot be fired unless the bow is drawn all the way back. - Shot arrows ignore enemy invincibility frames. - You can't expect much accuracy and the range is short, but it is very powerful at close range. - Although it looks like a crossbow, the enchantments it can apply are bow enchantments. ### Repeater Crossbow ![Repeater Crossbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deaf27ffce1aa2f886dc8eeecb865c34e1c83fc9.png) - A crossbow with incredible rapid-fire. - Shot arrows ignore enemy invincibility frames. - When you aim it, it will begin charging, and after a while it will continue firing arrows. - Once charging is complete, you will be unable to move at all. - It is awful to use, and it uses a lot of arrows, but it has incredible destructive power. - Although it looks like a crossbow, the enchantments it can apply are bow enchantments. ### Burst Arbalest ![Burst Arbalest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9acaced62ce20b1b10088d85a2b675a30778cf3b.png) - It can be charged up to 9 times. - Shot arrows ignore enemy invincibility frames. - It has relatively good distance and accuracy. - When release it, it will fire arrows equal to the number of charges. - In short, it's a less extreme repeater crossbow. ## Used assets Sounds in the "erdie" folder: by [Erdie](https://freesound.org/people/Erdie/) Sounds in the "dungeons" folder: from Minecraft Dungeons by Mojang ## Modpack If you want to use this mod in a modpack, please let me know.
